title: Right on Target
excerpt: Beyond thrilled to be on A Bullseye View , Target's online magazine! The editor and I chatted all about photos, paper and making the most of your fun and precious memories. I offered up some tips (mainly for beginners) and…
body:
Beyond thrilled to be on A Bullseye View, Target's online magazine! The editor and I chatted all about photos, paper and making the most of your fun and precious memories. I offered up some tips (mainly for beginners) and curated a list of must-haves.

Love that Two Peas In A Bucket is mentioned. Love the colorful mix of essential products they have in stores and online at Target, especially the tapes and Smash. The complete article can be found here. Thanks to the editor and Target for reaching out! (What a dream!)
